title: Senior Software Portfolio Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: Master's degree in Computer Science, Business, or comparable field
10+ years experience in software portfolio, product, or project management for standalone solutions
Deep knowledge of modern software development processes and architectures
Track record in building new business models, pricing, and market strategy
Experience steering external partners and subcontractors
Fluent in English and at least one additional language
bonus_skills: Background in payments, critical infrastructure, or banking software
Experience in complex global matrix organisations
matched_skills: Vendor and partner management (Intelligent Power Corporation, GRG Banking)
Go-to-market strategy experience (GRG Banking, Intelligent Power Corporation)
Stakeholder management and cross-functional coordination (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd)
missing_skills: 10+ years software portfolio/product management — candidate has ~6 years total experience, none in software product management
Deep knowledge of software development processes and architectures
Business case development for software P&L
Payments, currency technology, or security tech domain expertise
Track record scaling platform-based software businesses
core_responsibilities: Strategic development of a software portfolio from ideation to market leadership
Build and scale new business models in currency management sector
Full business case ownership: customer needs, value proposition, commercial success
End-to-end management of customer-driven development projects
Go-to-market strategy design and strategic partnership building
Unify a large matrix organisation behind a product vision
recommended_emphasis: This role is a very poor match — do not apply
G+D requires a seasoned software entrepreneur with 10+ years in platform-based software businesses; candidate has no software product management background
If pursuing similar roles in future, gaining experience in product-led growth or SaaS product management would be needed
summary: Match score is 8.3 (poor_match). This is a senior software entrepreneurship role requiring 10+ years of software portfolio/product management and deep technical knowledge of software architectures, none of which the candidate possesses. The GTM and partner management experience provides only marginal relevance. This vacancy is clearly out of scope for the candidate's profile and should not be pursued.
